doc.field: Correspondence from the island of Réunion (Île de Bourbon), plus one letter from Emily Ruete (Princess Salme of Zanzibar)
Correspondence from the island of Réunion (Île de Bourbon), plus one letter from Emily Ruete (Princess Salme of Zanzibar)
Correspondence from the island of Réunion (Île de Bourbon), plus one letter from Emily Ruete (Princess Salme of Zanzibar)

M. Labadie (merchant), Saint-Denis, to Mme. Delmas, Bordeaux : one letter, ALS, 1 leaf, 2 pages, describing an attack on the schooner "L'Aigle" by pirates near Muscat, in which Mme. Delmas' son was killed defending the ship; and a second narrative description of that incident (1 leaf, mss., 4 pages)

M. Labadie (merchant), Saint-Denis, to Mme. Delmas, Bordeaux : one letter, ALS, 1 leaf, 2 pages, describing an attack on the schooner "L'Aigle" by pirates near Muscat, in which Mme. Delmas' son was killed defending the ship; and a second narrative description of that incident (1 leaf, mss., 4 pages)

M. Labadie (merchant), Saint-Denis, to Mme. Delmas, Bordeaux : one letter, ALS, 1 leaf, 2 pages, describing an attack on the schooner "L'Aigle" by pirates near Muscat, in which Mme. Delmas' son was killed defending the ship; and a second narrative description of that incident (1 leaf, mss., 4 pages)

M. Labadie (merchant), Saint-Denis, to Mme. Delmas, Bordeaux : one letter, ALS, 1 leaf, 2 pages, describing an attack on the schooner "L'Aigle" by pirates near Muscat, in which Mme. Delmas' son was killed defending the ship; and a second narrative description of that incident (1 leaf, mss., 4 pages)
